subject: Excel COM add-in disabled after update
description: Internal planning add-in disappeared from ribbon after monthly Office update.

ts_steps.title: COM add-ins
ts_steps.action: File → Options → Add-ins — Manage COM Add-ins — re-enable; check 'Disabled Application Add-ins'.

ts_steps.title: Slow and disabled
ts_steps.action: If listed under 'Inactive' due to performance, adjust load behavior in registry per vendor doc (with approval).

ts_steps.title: Reinstall add-in
ts_steps.action: Run vendor MSI/setup again targeting current Office bitness (32 vs 64).

internal_information: Office hardening disables unsigned or slow add-ins. Vendor must certify for current channel. Registry DoNotDisable key last resort.
